hero.title: The CRM that actually speaks your language
hero.subtitle: WhatsApp-native. Understands Arabic dialects. Integrated with Zyrix Pay & FinSuite. Finally, a CRM designed for how business really works in Saudi, UAE, Turkey, Iraq & Egypt.
hero.trustIndicator: Trusted by growing teams in 14 countries

stats.title: The numbers tell the story
stats.subtitle: Why teams switch from Salesforce, HubSpot and Zoho to Zyrix

features.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
features.subtitle: A complete CRM platform with 16 core features — not 16 separate apps like Zoho, and not locked behind a $800/month tier like HubSpot.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp-Native Inbox
whatsapp.description: WhatsApp Business API integrated at the core. Every conversation auto-extracts contacts, deals, and follow-ups — in Arabic, Turkish, or English.

pipeline.title: Sales Pipeline
pipeline.description: Drag-and-drop Kanban with forecasting. Works offline on mobile. Syncs when you're back online.

aiCfo.title: AI CFO Dashboard
aiCfo.description: Predictive cash-flow analysis 60 days ahead. Spots crises before they happen — in Arabic or Turkish, with local tax rules.

quotes.title: Quotes & Proposals
quotes.description: Professional Arabic/Turkish templates. E-signature included. One click to convert to invoice.

loyalty.title: Customer Loyalty
loyalty.description: Points, tiers, and referrals designed for retail + service businesses across MENA.

commission.title: Commission Engine
commission.description: Custom rules per salesperson, per product, per region. Auto-calculated and transparent.

taxEngine.title: Tax Engine
taxEngine.description: VAT for Saudi & UAE, KDV for Turkey, general sales tax for Egypt. Always up to date.

portal.title: Customer Portal
portal.description: Let customers view invoices, submit tickets, and track orders — branded in your colors.

voice.title: Voice-First Arabic
voice.description: Speak in Iraqi, Egyptian, Gulf or Levantine Arabic. Zyrix understands dialects — no one else does.

whyZyrix.title: Why Zyrix beats Salesforce, HubSpot and Zoho

native.title: Actually built for here
native.description: Not translated. Not localized as an afterthought. Designed from day one around how business actually happens in MENA and Turkey.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp at the core
whatsapp.description: Other CRMs treat WhatsApp as a side channel. For your customers, it's THE channel. We built the whole system around it.

integrated.title: CRM + Pay + FinSuite in one
integrated.description: One login, one customer database, one source of truth across sales, payments, and finance. No integrations required.

fairPricing.title: Per-company pricing
fairPricing.description: Add your whole team for one flat fee. No 'per seat' pricing that penalizes growth.

cta.title: Ready to see the difference?
cta.subtitle: Start with a free account. Talk to sales when you're ready to scale.

Footer.tagline: The CRM that speaks your language. Built for MENA & Turkey.
